description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Migrating to the latest LTS versions (Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4) ensures long-term support, improved performance, enhanced security, and access to modern language features. Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and Spring Framework 6.x, which also mandates migration from javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where applicable. Ensure all dependencies are compatible with the target versions. Update build configuration (pom.xml or build.gradle) to reflect the new versions.
